data.title: Volex shifts from AIM to London Stock Exchange Main Market
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Volex plc ( (GB:VLX) ) has provided an announcement.

Volex plc, a specialist in critical power and data transmission products, has moved its listing from AIM to the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, with its ordinary shares now admitted to the FCA’s Official List. The company’s share capital comprises 184,377,640 ordinary shares, all carrying voting rights, and its ticker and ISIN remain unchanged, providing continuity for existing investors.

Management framed the move as a milestone that better reflects Volex’s increased scale and ambition following years of transformation and growth. By shifting to the Main Market, Volex aims to enhance its visibility and broaden its appeal to a wider base of UK and international investors, a step that could support future strategic execution and deepen its capital markets profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:VLX) stock is a Buy
with a £600.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Volex plc stock,
see the GB:VLX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VLX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VLX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (growth and profitability improvements with a strengthening balance sheet), partially offset by weaker cash-flow conversion. Technicals are a notable headwind due to a downtrend versus key moving averages, though oversold indicators reduce the severity. Valuation is reasonable but not cheap, and the latest earnings call adds support via strong guidance and operational momentum despite concentration and working-capital risks.

To see Spark’s full report on VLX stock,
click here.

More about Volex plc

Volex plc is a UK-headquartered integrated manufacturer specialising in power and data connectivity solutions for mission-critical applications. Serving international blue-chip customers, it operates 23 manufacturing facilities and supports OEMs and EMS companies across EV and electrification, consumer electricals, medical, complex industrial technology and off-highway markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 1,300,557

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £969.6M

data.title: Aroa Biosurgery Sets Fully Virtual 2026 AGM with Governance and CEO Incentive Votes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Aroa Biosurgery Ltd ( (AU:ARX) ) has provided an announcement.

Aroa Biosurgery Limited has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for 19 August 2026, to be held entirely as a virtual event accessible to shareholders and proxies online. The company has distributed the notice of meeting and proxy forms and is encouraging early proxy submissions, outlining how investors can register, attend, vote and ask questions remotely.

The AGM agenda includes addresses from the board chair and CEO, consideration of financial statements for the year ended 31 March 2026, and several ordinary resolutions on governance and remuneration. Shareholders will vote on the re-election and election of directors, authorising auditor remuneration, and approving the grant of deferred short-term incentives and long-term incentives to CEO and managing director Brian Ward under the company’s omnibus incentive plan, underscoring continued focus on leadership stability and performance-based compensation.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ARX) stock is a Buy
with a A$1.09 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aroa Biosurgery Ltd stock,
see the AU:ARX Stock Forecast page.

More about Aroa Biosurgery Ltd

Aroa Biosurgery Limited is a New Zealand–headquartered soft-tissue regeneration company that develops, manufactures and distributes medical and surgical products for complex wound healing and soft tissue reconstruction. Its products are based on the proprietary AROA ECM extracellular matrix bioscaffold technology derived from ovine forestomach, with more than 7 million devices used globally and a key market focus on the United States via a direct sales force and partner Teladoc Bio, Inc.

Average Trading Volume: 260,570

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Nippon Seisen Doubles Profit in First Quarter, Plans Higher Dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd. ( (JP:5659) ) has issued an announcement.

Nippon Seisen reported a solid start to the fiscal year, with net sales for the three months ended June 30, 2026 rising 7.4% year on year to ¥12.1 billion and operating profit surging 72.9% to ¥804 million. Ordinary profit climbed 81.7% to ¥878 million and profit attributable to owners of parent more than doubled to ¥635 million, lifting basic earnings per share to ¥20.69, while comprehensive income grew 143.5%.

Despite higher total assets and a slight decline in the equity ratio to 72.8%, the company maintained a robust financial position and kept its full-year forecasts unchanged, targeting 6.6% sales growth and a 30.4% increase in profit attributable to owners of parent. The board also plans to raise annual dividends from ¥42 to ¥46 per share in the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027, signaling confidence in earnings momentum and delivering a higher payout to shareholders.

More about Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd.

Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd. is a Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed manufacturer operating under Japanese GAAP, focusing on industrial materials such as specialty steel wire and related products. The company serves both domestic and overseas customers, leveraging its manufacturing base to support sectors that demand high-performance metal materials and precision components.

Average Trading Volume: 69,261

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen45.37B

Learn more about 5659 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from X2M Connect Limited ( (AU:X2M) ) is now available.

X2M Connect Limited has announced a proposed issue of up to 312,500,000 new ordinary fully paid shares and 250,000,000 options expiring on 2 June 2029 under a securities purchase plan. The offer, recorded on 23 July 2026 and scheduled to close on 31 August 2026 with an issue date of 7 September 2026, is intended to raise capital while applying for quotation of the new securities on the ASX, potentially strengthening the company’s balance sheet and market presence.

The securities purchase plan provides existing shareholders an avenue to increase their investment in X2M Connect, with the substantial volume of shares and options signalling an ambition to fund future growth or strategic initiatives. By aligning with ASX listing rules and seeking quotation for all securities issued under the plan, the company aims to enhance liquidity in its stock and broaden its investor base, which may support its long-term positioning in the smart infrastructure market.

More about X2M Connect Limited

X2M Connect Limited is an Australia-listed technology company trading under the ASX code X2M. The company operates in the connected infrastructure and utilities sector, providing solutions enabled through smart metering and communications to improve monitoring and management of distributed assets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:

YPB Group Ltd. ( (AU:CDE) ) has provided an announcement.

Codeifai Limited reported that all resolutions put to shareholders at its annual general meeting on 24 July 2026 were passed by poll, reflecting broad investor support for the company’s governance and strategic agenda. Shareholders backed the remuneration report, re-elected Colin Turner, elected Martin Ross to the board, and approved an additional 10% placement capacity and a specific share placement, giving the company expanded flexibility to raise capital and support future growth initiatives.

The strong voting margins in favour of all resolutions underscore investor confidence in Codeifai’s leadership and capital management strategy. Approval of the extra placement capacity and the proposed share issue strengthens the company’s ability to access equity markets efficiently, which may influence its funding mix and potential expansion plans, while the refreshed board composition positions it to oversee execution of these initiatives.

More about YPB Group Ltd.

Codeifai Limited, listed on the ASX under ticker CDE, operates as a public company based in Sydney, Australia, focusing on technology and digital services. The company engages with a broad shareholder base and uses annual general meetings as a key forum for corporate governance decisions and capital management approvals.

data.title: TVB Limited Rebrands with New Corporate Name and Registered Address
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Television Broadcasts Limited ( (HK:0511) ) has shared an update.

TVB Limited has officially changed its English name from Television Broadcasts Limited to TVB Limited and its Chinese name from 電視廣播有限公司 to 無綫集團有限公司, effective 24 July 2026, following earlier shareholder approvals. Existing share certificates bearing the former name will remain valid for legal title, trading, settlement, registration and delivery, with new certificates issued only under the new name going forward.

The company emphasized that the name change does not affect the rights of shareholders or security holders, and it will later announce details of a new Chinese stock short name once confirmed by the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. TVB also updated its registered address to reflect the renaming of “TVB City” to “TVB,” while keeping the physical location of its registered office unchanged, signalling a brand consolidation without operational disruption.

More about Television Broadcasts Limited

TVB Limited, formerly known as Television Broadcasts Limited, is a Hong Kong-based media company primarily engaged in television broadcasting and related entertainment services. The company focuses on serving audiences in Hong Kong and broader Chinese-speaking markets, operating from its facilities in Tseung Kwan O Industrial Estate in the New Territories.

Average Trading Volume: 989,393

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.09B

data.title: Perenti trims potential equity overhang as 1.76m conditional rights lapse
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Perenti Global ( (AU:PRN) ) has provided an update.

Perenti Limited has notified the market that 1,764,508 conditional rights to securities, designated as PRNAC, have lapsed after the conditions attached to those rights were not satisfied by 20 July 2026. The cessation of these rights slightly reduces the company’s potential future issued capital, which may have a modest effect on prospective dilution for existing shareholders but does not change the current share count.

The announcement, lodged as an Appendix 3H with the ASX, formalises the removal of these conditional rights from Perenti’s capital structure. While the disclosure is largely administrative, it clarifies the company’s outstanding equity instruments and may be viewed as a minor cleanup of contingent obligations tied to performance or service conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PRN) stock is a Buy
with a A$2.70 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perenti Global stock,
see the AU:PRN Stock Forecast page.

More about Perenti Global

Perenti Limited is an Australia-based mining services company listed on the ASX under the code PRN. The group typically provides contract mining, drilling and related support services to resource sector clients, focusing on large-scale projects in key mining jurisdictions.

Average Trading Volume: 2,459,882
